spec_match.rationale: Uses CSS @property to register `<time>`, `<angle>`, and `<number>` variables, demonstrating exact cross-unit division (`calc(--amp / 90deg * 100px)`).

interactive.rationale: Offers interactive sliders that instantly tune gears, pendulums, and bar heights via real-time variable updating.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfectly illustrates how registered variables permit pendulum and bar conversions with zero layout script branching.

edge_cases.rationale: Features explicit support detection for cross-unit calculations.

design_system.rationale: Complies with styles.css design tokens and alignment constraints.

summary: An excellent physical pendulum and gear animation tuner demonstrating registered time and angle properties, proving that cross-unit math can cancel and scale units cleanly inside CSS without JavaScript layout hacks.
